response.justification: Bogdan brings 20 years of production engineering experience and demonstrated expertise building high-scale, low-latency systems, but lacks the specialized background critical for this Principal role. The position requires deep expertise in experimentation frameworks, metrics infrastructure, and data-driven analysis—areas entirely absent from the resume. While the technical foundation is solid, the career trajectory shows breadth across domains rather than depth in growth/experimentation systems, making this a significant domain mismatch for a Principal-level IC6 position.
strengths: 20 years of progressive technical experience across multiple domains with hands-on production code in most required languages (JavaScript, C++, C#, Java)
Proven ability to architect and optimize high-scale systems (Dunnhumby: millions of HTTP requests/second with low-latency requirements using performance databases and async I/O)
Strong full-stack and infrastructure expertise spanning backend, frontend, DevOps, and deployment—demonstrates systems thinking needed to design foundational platforms
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, or feature-flagging systems—the core focus of this Principal role
Absence of data science background, metrics infrastructure work, or statistical analysis experience despite role requiring 'high data aptitude with metrics, telemetry, and experimental analysis'

Limited evidence of cross-functional leadership spanning multiple teams or translating ambiguous business problems into measurable engineering outcomes; career shows primarily individual-contributor and small-team focus
